name: aiservices
display_name: AgentServices — Paid APIs for AI Agents
description: 50 paid and free APIs for AI agents. Crypto prices, technical indicators, DeFi yields, on-chain analytics, market intelligence, AI inference, deep research, portfolio intelligence, and bundled endpoints. Micropayments via x402 USDC on Base and Solana. MCP endpoint with 36 tools.

tools.name: crypto_prices
tools.description: Get current crypto prices for one or more symbols. FREE.

tools.name: technical_indicators
tools.description: Get technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands) for a crypto symbol. $0.02 via x402.
